description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test, build, and deploy, using python:3.6.0-alpine as the default image. In the test stage add test_crawler and test_ui jobs that run on the default image and execute the commands: echo "Running crawler tests", cd crawler, pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-test.txt, python -m unittest discover -s tests/, coverage run -m unittest discover -s tests/, coverage report --include crawler/crawler.py for test_crawler; and echo "Running ui tests", cd ui, pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-test.txt, python -m unittest discover -s tests/, coverage run -m unittest discover -s tests/, coverage report --include ui/ui.py for test_ui. In the build stage add a manual build_GCR job using the google/cloud-sdk image with a docker:dind service, limited to the master branch, that runs: echo "$GOOGLE_KEY_SECRET" > key.json, gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file key.json, gcloud config set project ninth-arena-182211, gcloud container builds submit -t gcr.io/ninth-arena-182211/crawler crawler, gcloud container builds submit -t gcr.io/ninth-arena-182211/search_ui ui, gcloud container builds submit -t gcr.io/ninth-arena-182211/prometheus prometheus, gcloud container builds submit -t gcr.io/ninth-arena-182211/alertmanager alertmanager; also add a build_dockerhub job using the gitlab/dind image that runs: echo "Building the app", docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" -p "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD", docker build --pull -t gis23/crawler crawler, docker build --pull -t gis23/search_ui ui, docker build --pull -t gis23/prometheus prometheus, docker build --pull -t gis23/alertmanager alertmanager, docker push 'index.docker.io/gis23/crawler', docker push 'index.docker.io/gis23/search_ui', docker push 'index.docker.io/gis23/prometheus', docker push 'index.docker.io/gis23/alertmanager', with DOCKER_DRIVER set to overlay2. In the deploy stage add a deploy_staging job using google/cloud-sdk image, only on master, that runs: echo "$GOOGLE_KEY_SECRET" > key.json, gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file key.json, gcloud config set project ninth-arena-182211, gcloud docker --docker-host=$DOCKER_HOST --authorize-only, gcloud docker -- pull gcr.io/ninth-arena-182211/crawler, and sets environment variables DOCKER_HOST=tcp://35.205.126.2:2376 and DOCKER_TLS_VERIFY='1' to deploy to the staging environment at http://35.205.126.2. Ensure the build_GCR job is manual and all jobs reference the appropriate variables and services.
